allow: PowerShell(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command python3 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'python|py' })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Jules\\Documents\\WKPoule"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "py" -ArgumentList "serve.py" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "serve_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "serve_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — Waitress werkt" } catch { "Fout: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content serve_out.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item serve_out.txt,serve_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
